title: Notion MCP exposes a real-time context bridge for external AI tools
claim: Notion MCP is framed as a direct bridge that lets AI tools read and write workspace pages in real time, with context-aware access designed for agents.
source_snippet: MCP connects external AI tools directly to the Notion workspace in real time.
implication: ProductOS should think beyond native prompts and support explicit tool-facing context access with strong source boundaries.
followup_questions: Should ProductOS expose a retrieval-only mode before it exposes write access to external agents?
